description: Atomically reference-counted pointer. Thread-safe version of Rc. Shared ownership across threads. Python equivalent: shared objects with the GIL, but explicit and lock-free for reads.

methods.name: clone
methods.example:
let a = Arc::new(5);
let b = Arc::clone(&a);

methods.name: strong_count
methods.description: Returns the number of strong pointers.

methods.name: try_unwrap
methods.description: Returns the inner value if there is exactly one strong reference.

methods.name: downgrade
methods.description: Creates a Weak pointer that does not prevent deallocation.
